title: podocarpium podocarpum var. oxyphyllum
intro: Podocarpium podocarpum var. oxyphyllum, also known as the 'Mao Kao', is a type of plant that belongs to the Podocarpaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Podocarpium podocarpum var. oxyphyllum include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
